description: Verified cryptocurrency references in rap/hip-hop lyrics (2009-present). Each entry's lyric was confirmed verbatim against a fetchable source listed in `source`. Genius links in the README point to a Genius search query (direct page slugs could not be programmatically validated). YouTube links were gathered from search results.

verified.excerpt: You know rappers like to rock chains / I rock blockchains, knock 'em out the box off Mount Gox, mang [...] I'm a bitcoin baron, I'm scaring the status quo / Got that crypto dough in that .dat file to blow
I'm not the one for all the small talk / I'm like Christopher Lloyd, Big Noyd / Bitcoins, rosemary on the strip loin / Mike Tyson doin' endos on a Haro
Stack a couple bit coins / All up on my Nakamoto / Chillin' with your lady friend / She rockin' an untied kimono
verified.note: Producer/electronic track with a rapped verse (ProbCause). Included for the rare Satoshi Nakamoto name-drop.

verified.excerpt: 'Member everybody used to bite Nickel? / Now everybody doin' Bitcoin
verified.note: Line is rapped by featured artist Royce da 5'9", on Eminem's album Kamikaze.

verified.excerpt: I made 100 racks off of bitcoin / You can catch me trappin' with the bitcoin / You can catch me runnin' up the bitcoin / I spent 6,000 on the bitcoin
I turn my Ws to Ms, yeah I flip those / I might buy her red bottoms with the crypto / Three coins, that'll pay ya whole semester / But you gotta ride it better than a Tesla
verified.note: Crypto bar belongs to Big Sean's verse, not 2 Chainz's.

verified.excerpt: Quit that, got a better chance with Bitcoin / Big banks see you stuntin' and this shit's deep / Crypt keep and now you're fuckin' with the blockchain
If you want the ride and you want the riches then just buy more coin and get the bitches / 'Cause bitcoin 'bout to go straight through the roof, it's got the PBOC shakin' in their boots
The miners make money by takin' a fee every time a transaction is made and complete / And they work every minute and day of the week / A guy named Satoshi created this all / He's the mastermind of it
verified.note: Assembled from two cited passages; lines may not be contiguous.

verified.artist: Rick Ross (feat. John Legend & Lil Wayne)
verified.excerpt: Money overboard, kilos washin' ashore / Paintings on the wall, Versace down to the drawers / Currency come in crypto, you know they tapin' our calls
Winner in life, fuck a coin toss / I'm Coinbased, basically cryptocurrency Scarface
Fuckin' with the Coinbase Pro, got Zcash / Fuckin' with the Robinhood out, got a free bag / And I'm on the blockchain, burnin' on blockchain / Damn, this shit some octane
All this crypto in the world, you could get rich in a day / So I don't get why you're invested in the women I date
Gave your girl a Robinhood portfolio / Thirty K in Doge, yeah, go indulge
But I'm in two minds, it goes up and down like the crypto price / Short and sweet, when I doggy that one, she gotta go on her tiptoes
Before we talk paper, let's make a simple assessment / My little crypto investment was probably triple your necklace
Lost a couple million on Bitcoin, don't feel bad / Don't feel bad for me, I'm rich, I'm straight, I'm good, I'm always set
verified.note: No official YouTube video found; SoundCloud is the canonical upload.

verified.excerpt: She want the info / I wanna talk about crypto / I'm tryna leave that boy bloody / Like Bron when he threw the elbow
verified.note: "Crypto" here doubles as street slang; included as the song is built around the word.

verified.excerpt: Pay the rent and the car note, he invest in me like crypto

They told us "Chase a dollar," then made everyone broke / I feel like cryptocurrency is probably our last financial hope / Soon enough, the government will leave your bank account froze / Judgment Day is comin', you can run or you can stand and fight
For every Jack Harlow, it's a white boy who didn't make it / And works in crypto and intellectual property / You can't copy me
verified.note: Listener-transcribed (contributor-provided); billy woods lyrics are hosted on Genius, which is unfetchable here, so awaiting an independent lyric-page confirmation. Track is the opener on Blockhead's The Aux (Backwoodz Studioz).

verified.excerpt: People from my city could never entertain ol' boy / Promising big transaction and even Bitcoin / I'll never peace it up
All I hear is gifts, gifts, gifts, digital collectibles / What? Blockchain? [...] Shout out to TON / Telegram
verified.note: Lines are non-consecutive; "TON" refers to the Toncoin / TON blockchain.

verified.excerpt: What's the get-back for niggas? It's TBD / I look at this shit like a BTC / Could be down this week, then I'm up next week
Turn Ether to Etherium, y'all wanna bet? / I got a crypto key, it come with a password / Then I flipped that key to digital cash, word / [...] I'm from the block with a chain, this the new blockchain
verified.note: From the album Light-Years (Dec 2025). The only verified standalone Ethereum reference in the catalog.

verified.excerpt: Ayy, I am, I am, I am / A BTC, crypto big timer / A corporate America hit survivor / Got a real big heart, I'm a fucked up guy though
verified.note: From the album Iceman; the verse also nods to FTX / Sam Bankman-Fried.

verified.excerpt: Shawty a wifey, we hike up the hills / She got a man, so I hold like Solana
verified.note: "Hold" doubles as HODL; title track of the 2026 album Ca$ino.

reported_unverified.reason: Quoted only in a single secondary source (Vice); couldn't pin the exact track version or a clean audio link.
On the Crypto Business mixtape; no verbatim lyric could be sourced.
